resources.string: View top surveys from your account along with the total number of responses being collected.
In app dashboard gives you an overiew of the total number of responses that has been collected.
QuestionPro surveys app gives you an option to share the responses using gmail, facebook, twitter and linkedin.
Don’t know what to ask? Deploy a survey using our expert frameworks.

string-array.name: ms_titles
string-array.item: Focus on what matters to you

string-array.name: ms_texts
string-array.item: Get a live mobile dashboard with advanced filtering capabilities include date and response status filters.
Select sections or questions which matter to you and hide the rest.
Push notifications of when respondents take your survey or alerts when specific response criterion are met.
Share snapshots of a specific chart or the whole report - including data-segments and cross-tabs.
Advanced analysis using mobile crosstabulation to help you compare relationship between two variables.
